infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: UrbanFix needs your location to find nearby technicians and provide pickup/delivery services.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: UrbanFix needs camera access to take photos of devices for repair documentation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: UrbanFix needs photo library access to upload images of devices for repair documentation.
